# SecCSDigestAlgorithm

**Enumeration**

The list of digest algorithms available for code signatures.

## Declaration

```swift
enum SecCSDigestAlgorithm
```

## Overview

Use these values with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithm] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithms] keys described in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/signing-information-dictionary-keys].

## Enumeration Cases

- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureHashSHA1**
- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureHashSHA256**
- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureHashSHA256Truncated**
- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureHashSHA384**
- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureHashSHA512**
- **SecCSDigestAlgorithm.codeSignatureNoHash**

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
title: SecCSDigestAlgorithm
